title: Hungary May No Longer Be Putin’s Ally, but It Can’t Afford a Full Break
summary_full: Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s defeat will make it harder for the Kremlin to divide Europe, but Moscow retains leverage through energy sales.
summary_public: Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s defeat will make it harder for the Kremlin to divide Europe, but Moscow retains leverage through energy sales.
